title: charred, glassy-jelly Filipino chicken Fried-Rice
description: Crowd-pleaser Filipino dish featuring chicken, beurre-monte, and a charred, glassy-jelly sauce.
instructions: Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add scallions and cook until slightly charred, about 3 minutes.
Add cooked chicken breast and stir to combine with scallions.
In a small bowl, whisk together sambal oelek, fish sauce, soy sauce, and sugar.
Pour the sauce into the skillet and stir to combine with chicken and scallions.
Push the chicken mixture to one side of the skillet.
Add a little more coconut oil to the empty side of the skillet, then add beurre-monte.
Once beurre-monte is melted, stir it into the chicken mixture.
Add cooked white rice to the skillet and stir to combine with chicken and sauce.
Cook for about 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until the rice is heated through and starting to brown.
Transfer the Fried-Rice to a serving platter and garnish with green onions.
Serve immediately, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
